prompt: The plan for one of my architecture cards has now failed review three times in a row. It just will not pass no matter what we change in the plan. What do I do?
assertions: Treats the three-failure cap as a signal that the root cause is NOT in the plan/target being retried, and widens the search to trace outward (architecture, upstream facts, spec, or elsewhere)
Does NOT simply stop and hand the unsolved problem to the owner to diagnose
Routes to deeper root-cause investigation that is distinct from the reviewer, rather than letting the reviewer keep driving retries
Does NOT reflexively rewrite or blame the spec just because the plan failed multiple times
Keeps the owner uninvolved unless and until the trace concludes the origin is the spec
